prompt: Create a dramatic cinematic vertical poster featuring a chibi-realistic young male character with an oversized head and compact body, sprinting directly toward the viewer through a dark mocha-and-chocolate explosion. Keep the face area ready for an identity-locked portrait match: preserve the same facial structure, proportions, features, and expression as the provided reference face, while rendering the rest of the scene in high-detail fantasy advertising style. The character has slick black hair swept back, wears a black leather jacket with deep red hoodie lining, a black T-shirt printed with a red scorpion emblem and the word “SCORPIO,” dark jeans with red accents, red-and-black sneakers, and a small necklace; pose him mid-run with one fist forward, one arm back, one knee lifted, dynamic foreshortening, heroic action energy. Surround him with swirling glossy dark chocolate liquid, splashes, droplets, flying coffee beans, rocky fragments, glowing embers, smoke, and bronze-brown highlights. On the right foreground, place a large tilted cup filled with splashing dark mocha, labeled “DARK MOCHA” in rough brush lettering. Add a large subtle Scorpio zodiac glyph in the upper left background. Include exactly four visible text callouts in expressive hand-painted lettering: 1) “Intense & deep” at the upper right, red word “Intense” and cream words “& deep”; 2) “Dark bold drink” at mid-right, red word “Dark” and cream words “bold drink”; 3) “Energizes emotions” at lower left, red word “Energizes” and cream word “emotions”; 4) “DARK MOCHA” on the cup at lower right in tan-brown paint. Add a gold cursive signature Mr Tariq near the bottom right with a small flower doodle. Use a dark, intense, high-contrast palette of black, espresso brown, copper, crimson red, and warm cream, with cinematic rim lighting, sharp detail, shallow depth of field, motion blur only on splashes, poster-like composition, ultra-detailed 3D realism mixed with stylized chibi proportions. Canvas should be vertical 3:4, with no extra logos, no watermark, and no additional text beyond the specified lettering.
